title: Beeper
description: In this resource pack the Bee its replaced with Beeper, a combination of a bee and a creeper
body:
On Dec. 23, 2023 Alan Becker made a video, i saw a bee, a combination of a be and a creeper.

 

So... i wanted to have this bee in minecraft vanilla, So in the end I decided to do it. So if you also wanted this bee, then I have already fulfilled this dream for you.
